name: GAP-SIG7-BRITROC
verbatim_evidence: KB claim: BriTROC Sig7 platinum-resistance threshold=0.25 (constants.py:29); BRITROC_MASTER.csv 273pts on-disk but UNUSED at runtime; hardcoded midpoint heuristic
Current tier: HEURISTIC (threshold not fit to data)
Zeta dataset: EGA EGAD00001011049 (BriTROC-1) — 679 BAMs / 292 patients / 510.8GB
EGA metadata unblocks temporal stratification: diagnosis(385)/relapse(294) split now known

attributes.how: Extract SBS mutational signatures (incl. Sig7/HRD-associated) from tumor BAMs; derive per-patient Sig exposures; fit platinum sensitive/resistant classifier; nested-CV. Replaces hardcoded 0.25 with a data-derived, cross-validated threshold + CI.
attributes.blocker: Full BAM processing = HPC + Europe VM (measured 1.1MB/s here -> 1.8-5.3 days DL alone). Clinical labels (PFI/platinum status) require BriTROC-1 supplement mapping BAM->patient->outcome (NOT in EGA dataset).
attributes.closes_gap: PARTIAL - infrastructure + raw data available; needs HPC run + external clinical map
attributes.kb_claim: BriTROC Sig7 platinum-resistance threshold=0.25 (constants.py:29); BRITROC_MASTER.csv 273pts on-disk but UNUSED at runtime; hardcoded midpoint heuristic
attributes.temporal_axis_status: AVAILABLE via metadata (385 diagnosis vs 294 relapse) - enables Sig7 diagnosis->relapse contrast without BAM download

name: GAP-SAE-LEAKAGE
verbatim_evidence: KB claim: TRUE SAE baseline AUROC 0.783 (149pts) -> nested-CV 0.478 (-0.305 'significant_leakage'); Tier3_validation_cohort.json STRIPPED
Current tier: LEAKAGE_FLAGGED (proxy 0.631 vs true 0.485)
Zeta dataset: SAS PDS longitudinal labs (adlb.sas7bdat, 28-122MB/trial) + adverse events (adae) across 102 trials

attributes.role: TEST (external replication of SAE-style serial-marker leakage)
attributes.how: PDS trials carry serial safety labs + AE timelines. Can test whether serial-biomarker 'escalation' features generalize out-of-sample vs leak — the exact failure mode flagged for SAE. Independent cohorts break the leakage.
attributes.blocker: PDS is pan-cancer clinical-trial data, not the exact SAE ovarian cohort; serves as external stress-test, not a like-for-like restore of Tier3.
attributes.closes_gap: PARTIAL - enables independent leakage stress-test; does NOT restore stripped Tier3 cohort
attributes.zeta_dataset: SAS PDS longitudinal labs (adlb.sas7bdat, 28-122MB/trial) + adverse events (adae) across 102 trials
attributes.kb_claim: TRUE SAE baseline AUROC 0.783 (149pts) -> nested-CV 0.478 (-0.305 'significant_leakage'); Tier3_validation_cohort.json STRIPPED

name: GAP-23GENE-PROXY
verbatim_evidence: KB claim: 23-gene DDR proxy panel AUROC 0.495 (95%CI 0.386-0.602) on TCGA-OV (166pts) = RANDOM; mean scores backwards (resistant 0.238 < sensitive 0.253)
Current tier: RANDOM (not better than chance)
Zeta dataset: EGA BriTROC-1 (genomic truth) + Synapse MSK cohort.maf/cna.tsv (mutation+CNA)

attributes.role: VALIDATE (re-derive DDR panel on orthogonal genomic cohort)
attributes.how: BriTROC + MSK give independent DDR mutation/CNA profiles with platinum outcomes; re-fit or refute the 23-gene panel on non-TCGA data. If still ~0.5, panel is dead; if signal emerges, panel becomes cohort-specific.
attributes.blocker: MSK bytes blocked (invalid token); BriTROC needs HPC + clinical map.
attributes.closes_gap: PARTIAL - validation cohorts identified; access blockers apply
attributes.zeta_dataset: EGA BriTROC-1 (genomic truth) + Synapse MSK cohort.maf/cna.tsv (mutation+CNA)
attributes.kb_claim: 23-gene DDR proxy panel AUROC 0.495 (95%CI 0.386-0.602) on TCGA-OV (166pts) = RANDOM; mean scores backwards (resistant 0.238 < sensitive 0.253)

name: GAP-KELIM-SIM
verbatim_evidence: KB claim: KELIM convergence model trained on N=500 SIMULATED (MC seed 42), 0 real patients; Model4 AUROC 0.828 but uplift +0.000 vs additive, -0.002 vs KELIM-only. Coeffs kelim_k=-3.2202 etc = sim, not fit
Current tier: SIMULATION_ONLY (no real patients)
Zeta dataset: SAS PDS trials with serial CA-125 / tumor-marker kinetics (ador/adef/adlb series) — analog to KELIM value path

attributes.role: TRAIN (real serial-marker kinetics to replace simulated betas)
attributes.how: PDS longitudinal marker series enable real KELIM-style kinetic modeling with actual outcomes, replacing the MC-seeded convergence betas. Only if a trial has CA-125-equivalent serial markers + platinum-type outcome.
attributes.blocker: PDS is pan-cancer; need to locate ovarian/serial-CA125 trial. KELIM value path (Lyon API) already works; this targets the SIM convergence betas only.
attributes.closes_gap: PARTIAL - real serial-marker training feasible if matching trial identified
attributes.zeta_dataset: SAS PDS trials with serial CA-125 / tumor-marker kinetics (ador/adef/adlb series) — analog to KELIM value path
attributes.kb_claim: KELIM convergence model trained on N=500 SIMULATED (MC seed 42), 0 real patients; Model4 AUROC 0.828 but uplift +0.000 vs additive, -0.002 vs KELIM-only. Coeffs kelim_k=-3.2202 etc = sim, not fit

name: GAP-MSK-ESCAPE-N39

Current tier: STRIPPED (backend), stub-only on disk
